description: `[1 2][1] = 5` (issue #407/F7): assigns to a postfix read over a list-literal base, not a place, raising the runtime's own `ol-not-a-place` (reached without `check()`, mirroring `not-a-place-runtime-list-literal.expected.json`'s bare-list case) — proving `not-a-place-text.ts`'s runtime-side `PostfixExpressionNode` renderer, added in lockstep with the checker's, produces the same full target text `[1 2][1]`.
